name: @forgeax/template-game-default
description: Default GameEntry template -- a lowpoly vignette authored in scene.pack.json (engine-native scene pack) + a movable Player. Loaded by apps/preview via loadGame dynamic import.

bundle-size.reason: template bundle is downstream of the host app (apps/preview)

fps.reason: template has no independent smoke gate

bench.reason: template scaffold; bench focus stays on engine packages

gate.reason: no CI gate on template scaffold; apps/preview hosts acceptance
